name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Make small meatballs and set aside.
2. Combine sauce ingredients and set aside.
3. Add oil to a hot wok. Swirl to coat the bottom and sides.
4. Stir fry garlic, scallions, and ginger for 30 seconds.
5. Add meatballs and gently stir fry for about 1 minute. Remove the meatballs from the wok and set aside.
6. Wipe the wok clean.
7. Reheat the wok, then add oil and stir fry green peppers, onion, and tomato in consecutive order, stirring for 30 seconds after each addition.
8. Push the vegetables to one side of the wok.
9. Stir in the sweet and sour sauce until thickened and bubbly, then pour it into the center of the wok.
10. Return the meatballs and pineapple to the wok, stirring thoroughly.
11. Heat through and serve.
